WRITING / long-form notes, in public

Systems, software, measured

Notes on the layer where abstractions stop being free. Published when ready.

2 DISPATCHESLONG-FORM · NO ADS · RSS
Filter ·
LEAD · NOV 14, 2025 12 MIN READ
14
NOV
SYSTEMSLEARNING

On the quiet cost of context switches, and the places they hide

A context switch costs a few microseconds on paper. In practice, it costs a cache, a branch predictor, and the quiet coherence you'd built up over the last thousand instructions. A walk through perf, some toy benchmarks, and the strange kind of patience required to measure what isn't there.

DISPATCH № 23 READ →
